description:
* a failed request to /v1/billing-and-subscriptions returned a generic
  401 with no signal about whether the auth guard rejected it or why

This commit:

* add unique FxaOAuthError subclasses for each auth failure point
* emit an auth.fail metric and one log line (reason = error class) when
  FxaOAuthAuthGuard rejects a request
* return 503 instead of 401 when the auth server is unreachable during
  opaque-token verify
* log unmatched routes at debug

Closes #PAY-3806
